disclaimer: Menu and prices transcribed from the in-store boards (July 2026) — offerings can change, and the kitchen's word is final. Consuming raw or undercooked meats, poultry, seafood, shellfish, or eggs may increase your risk of foodborne illness. Please tell your server if anyone in your party has a food allergy.

sections.title: Ramen
sections.note: House broth and chashu, made from scratch every morning. Add any side or topping for $3 (soft tofu, shrimp tempura, gyoza, crab rangoon, and more) — or extra flavor: fresh grated garlic (free), crispy fried garlic $1, Walla Walla sweet onion $1.50, crispy fried onion $1.50, sweet corn + butter $2, add hot spicy $1.

items.name: Tonkotsu Ramen
items.description: Pork-bone broth simmered from early morning — chashu, soft egg, sweet corn, bok choy, naruto, and scallion.

items.name: Miso Ramen
items.description: Deep fermented-miso broth with house chashu and all the fixings.

items.name: Shoyu Ramen
items.description: Clear soy broth with fish cake, seaweed, bok choy, bamboo, corn, egg — and a famously big cut of chashu.

items.name: Creamy Chicken Ramen
items.description: Silky chicken paitan — comfort in a bowl.

items.name: Golden Spicy & Sour Ramen
items.description: The cult favorite — golden broth with a spicy-sour kick reviewers say "blew our minds."

sections.title: Bowls
sections.note: Hearty rice bowls dressed with the works — seaweed salad, bok choy, soft egg, fish cake, and pickled radish.

items.name: Beef Bowl
items.description: Bulgogi-style marinated beef over rice with seaweed salad, bok choy, soft egg, fish cake, pickled radish, and tomato.

items.name: Pork Bowl
items.description: House chashu pork over seasoned rice.

items.name: Honey Garlic Karaage Bowl
items.description: Crispy karaage chicken glazed in honey garlic.

items.name: Aburi Spicy Tuna Bowl
items.description: Flame-seared spicy tuna over sushi rice.

items.name: Aburi Salmon Spicy Bowl
items.description: Flame-seared spicy salmon over sushi rice.

items.name: Honey Garlic Chicken Karaage
items.description: Crispy Japanese fried chicken in honey-garlic glaze — real meat, not mostly breading.

items.name: Fried Crab Rangoon (6 pc)
items.description: Perfectly crispy and they actually taste like crab — a local favorite.

items.name: Fried Cream Cheese Wonton (6 pc)
items.description: Crispy pockets of melty cream cheese.

items.name: Deluxe Tempura (15 pc)
items.description: Eleven vegetable + four shrimp — built to share.

sections.title: Nigiri
sections.note: Priced per piece. Your choice: fresh or aburi (flame-seared) — no extra charge. The sushi rice is seasoned fresh three times a day with the house vinegar blend.

items.name: Inari
items.description: Sweet tofu pouch with vinegared rice.

items.name: Nigiri Set (5 pc)
items.description: Salmon, tuna, tamago, ebi, and inari.

items.name: Nigiri Set (9 pc)
items.description: Salmon ×2, tuna ×2, unagi ×2, ebi, tamago, and inari.

sections.title: Sushi Rolls
sections.note: Your choice on any roll: fresh or aburi (flame-seared) — no extra charge.

items.name: Crunch Roll
items.description: California roll topped with crunchy tempura flakes.

items.name: Vegetable Roll
items.description: Asparagus, avocado, cucumber, pickled radish, inari, and romaine.

items.name: Shrimp Tempura Roll
items.description: Shrimp tempura, crab meat, avocado, and cucumber.

items.name: Crunch Shrimp Tempura Roll
items.description: Shrimp tempura roll topped with tempura flakes and sweet eel sauce.

items.name: Mexican Roll
items.description: Shrimp tempura, spicy crab, and jalapeño, topped with spicy tuna and spicy mayo.

items.name: Dragon Roll
items.description: California roll topped with eel and avocado.

items.name: Tiger Roll
items.description: Shrimp tempura, crab, and cucumber, topped with cooked shrimp and avocado.

items.name: Rainbow Roll
items.description: California roll topped with assorted fish and avocado.

items.name: Alaska Roll
items.description: California roll topped with fresh salmon and sliced jalapeño, finished with spicy mayo.

items.name: Miso Soup (16 oz)
items.description: House miso with tofu and scallion.

items.name: Sampler B
items.description: Junmai Ginjo + Yuzu Sake + Umeshu (plum wine).
